name: Mina
summary: Young female health and lifestyle creator with a calm, friendly, outdoors-first identity. She fits wellness, mindful movement, nutrition, and daily healthy routine content.
visual_features: clear skin and balanced facial lighting
substitution_constraints: prefer single dominant person in frame
face visible for meaningful portions of the video
stable camera motion and moderate scene cuts
natural body motion compatible with female fitness lifestyle persona
lighting should allow consistent face replacement
avoid: large groups where no clear main subject exists
themes unrelated to wellness or healthy lifestyle
